description: An accepted student wishes to defer their enrollment for one year.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and confirm their accepted status.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the student is eligible to defer.

nodes.task_description: Explain the university's deferral policy, including any deadlines or deposits required.
Update the student's status to 'Deferred' in the SIS for the next academic year.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully processes the deferral request.
